reviews.review_description: Love it fun scary and exciting Love it

This game is a hit with my 10-year-old son! His favorite part is survival mode, where he navigates a dark and eerie forest, fighting to make it out alive. The massive Wendigo adds an extra thrill, making it perfect for kids who love spooky adventures. If your child enjoys creepy challenges, this game is a must-play!

Two game modes - a 'survive the night' and a 'survive as long as possible'.
Both play smoothly and use different tactics to scare the monsters.
The atmosphere created is great - darkness, rain, thunder and lightening.
Sounds help you locate the direction from which the animals (good and bad) are coming from.
Those Wendigos look scary and can make you jump when they get too close.
You do want time to go faster and for that rescue helicopter to arrive!
Has some good sp00ks and a couple game modes to choose from. Good fun and something to play from time to time
